name: The Primary Discovered Signal (최초의 발견된 신호)
definition: The pre-existing universal symmetry where Essence (Sun), Manifestation (Earth), and Reflection (Moon) are found to be in 120-degree resonant equilibrium.

trajectory.positive_reason: Essence pierces through phenomena; all sameness converges to the point.
trajectory.negative_necessity: Difference defines form; the void constrains the manifest.
